zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Whitton於1364年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，她的父親John Whitton30歲，母親Joan Hussey15歲。她於1381年與Henry De Sydenham在英國薩默塞特可姆 聖 尼古拉斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1412年3月21日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特希登哈姆享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Whitton于1364年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，她的父亲John Whitton30岁，母亲Joan Hussey15岁。她于1381年与Henry De Sydenham在英国薩默塞特可姆 聖 尼古拉斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1412年3月21日在英国英格兰薩默塞特希登哈姆享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Whitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Whitton in Morebattle (Roxburghshire). The placename is from Old English hwīt ‘white’ + tūn ‘farm, village’, as with many of the places in 2 below.

English: habitational name from any of the places called Whitton (Durham, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Northumberland, Shropshire, Suffolk) or Witton (Cheshire, Durham, Lancashire, Herefordshire, Norfolk, Northumberland, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, North Yorkshire); or possibly from Wyton (Huntingdonshire, East Yorkshire); or possibly from Weeton, Market Weighton, or Little Weighton (East Yorkshire). The placenames do not all share the same etymology but most of their post-medieval spellings are interchangeable. Most of the placenames derive from the Old English personal name Hwīta or Old English hwīt ‘white’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some, for example Witton in Warwickshire, derive from Old English wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farmstead’ + tūn, and some others, for example Witton in Norfolk, derive from Old English widu ‘wood’ + tūn. Whitton in Lincolnshire derives from the Old English personal name Hwīta (genitive Hwītan) or Old English hwīt (dative hwītan) + ēg ‘island’. Witton in Lancashire derives from the Old English personal Witta + Old English tūn.
English: in Devon, this surname is a variant of   Whiddon  .

variants.name: Whitten
meanings: English: variant of   Whitton   or   Whiting  .

variants.name: Whetten
meanings: English, Scottish, or northern Irish: variant of   Whitton  .

variants.name: Whiddon
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from any of numerous minor places in Devon named Whiddon. Some are named with Old English hwīt ‘white’ + dūn ‘hill’ or tūn ‘farmstead, estate’; others with Old English hwǣte ‘wheat’ + dūn or denu ‘valley’.

variants.name: Whiton
meanings: English (Essex): variant of   Whitton  . This surname is now rare in Britain.
History: James Whiton of Hingham, Norfolk, England, came to Plymouth, MA, in 1635.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Whitton was born in 1364, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Whitton, was 30 and her mother, Joan Hussey, was 15. She married Henry De Sydenham in 1381, in Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 21 March 1412, in Sydenham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Whitton est née en 1364, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Whitton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan Hussey, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Henry De Sydenham en 1381, à Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 21 mars 1412, à Sydenham, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Whitton 1364 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Whitton 30 und ihre Mutter Joan Hussey 15. Sie hat 1381 in Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England Henry De Sydenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 21. März 1412 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Sydenham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Whitton è nata il nel 1364 nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Whitton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Joan Hussey, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Henry De Sydenham nel 1381, nel Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 21 marzo 1412, nel Sydenham, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Whitton(이)가 1364년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Whitton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Hussey(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1381년 영국 서머세트 코브 스트 닉홀아스에서 Henry De Sydenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 3월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 시데함에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry De Sydenham в 1381 г. в местности комб ст ничолас, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 21 марта 1412 г. в местности сиденам, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
